executives.name: Lisa Su
executives.background: Dr. Su is AMD’s Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer. She has been AMD’s President and Chief Executive Officer since October 2014 and Chair of the Board since May 2022. Previously, she served as Senior Vice President and General Manager, Global Business Units from 2012 to 2014. Prior to joining AMD, Dr. Su served as Senior Vice President and General Manager, Networking and Multimedia at Freescale Semiconductor, Inc. and spent 13 years at IBM in various engineering and business leadership positions.

tenure_dates.title: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer
President and Chief Executive Officer (also Chair of the Board)

executives.name: Jean Hu
executives.background: Ms. Hu is AMD’s Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer. She joined AMD in January 2023. Previously, she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Marvell Technology, Inc. from 2016 to 2023. She also held senior financial leadership roles at Qlogic and Conexant Systems.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer
Executive Vice President, CFO and Treasurer

executives.name: Mark Papermaster
executives.background: Mr. Papermaster is AMD’s Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer. He joined AMD in 2011. Previously, he was Vice President of the Silicon Engineering Group at Cisco Systems, Inc. and Senior Vice President of Devices Hardware Engineering at Apple Inc. He also spent 26 years at IBM.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer
Chief Technology Officer and Executive Vice President

executives.name: Forrest Norrod
executives.background: Mr. Norrod is AMD’s Executive Vice President and General Manager, Data Center Solutions Business Group. He joined AMD in 2014. Previously, he was Vice President and General Manager of Dell’s server business.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Manager, Data Center Solutions Business Group
Executive Vice President and General Manager, Data Center Solutions

executives.name: Harry Wolin
executives.background: Mr. Wolin is AMD’s Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary. He has been with AMD since 2000 and was appointed General Counsel in 2003.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Abhi Talwalkar
executives.background: Former President and CEO of LSI Corporation. Director since 2017.

executives.name: Abhijit Talwalkar
executives.background: Mr. Talwalkar has been a director since 2011 and Chairman of the Board since 2019. He was President and CEO of LSI Corporation from 2005 to 2014.

executives.name: Ahmed Yahia Al Idrissi
executives.background: Chairman of the Board. He is the CEO of Direct Investments at Mubadala Investment Company. He has been a director since 2009.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Ariel Kelman
executives.background: Ariel Kelman is President and Chief Marketing Officer of Salesforce. He joined Salesforce in 2023 from Oracle, where he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer

executives.name: Ava Hahn
executives.background: Ms. Hahn has been our Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Secretary since January 2020. Prior to joining Lam, she served as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Secretary of CA Technologies from 2018 to 2019.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Craig Conway
executives.background: Former President and CEO of PeopleSoft, Inc. He has served as a Director since 2005.

executives.name: Elizabeth Vanderslice
executives.background: Former CEO of Wired Digital, Inc. Joined AMD board following the Xilinx acquisition in 2022.

executives.name: John Caldwell
executives.background: Former President and CEO of SMTC Corporation. Director since 2006. Lead Independent Director.

executives.name: Jon Olson
executives.background: Former CFO of Xilinx, Inc. Joined AMD board following the Xilinx acquisition in 2022.

executives.name: Joseph Householder
executives.background: Former President and COO of Sempra Energy. Director since 2014.

executives.name: Mark Durcan
executives.background: Former CEO of Micron Technology, Inc. Director since 2017.

executives.name: Michael Gregoire
executives.background: Former CEO of CA Technologies and Taleo Corporation. Director since 2019.

executives.name: Nora Denzel
executives.background: Former Interim CEO of Outerwall Inc. and former executive at Intuit and HP. Director since 2014.

executives.name: Paulett Eberhart
executives.background: CEO of HMS Ventures. Former President and CEO of Invensys Process Systems.

executives.name: Robert Rivet
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President, Chief Operations and Administrative Officer of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Operations and Administrative Officer (formerly CFO)

executives.name: Stacy MacDiarmid
executives.background: Ms. MacDiarmid has served as Chief Human Resources Officer since January 2021. She has been with Fluor since 1998.

executives.name: Thomas Seifert
executives.background: Thomas Seifert has served as our Chief Financial Officer since June 2017. From December 2012 to April 2017, Mr. Seifert served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Symantec Corporation, a cybersecurity software and services company. From 2009 to 2012, Mr. Seifert served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., a semiconductor company. From 2008 to 2009, Mr. Seifert served as Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer of Qimonda AG, a German memory chip manufacturer. Mr. Seifert currently serves on the board of directors of First Solar, Inc., a solar energy solutions company. Mr. Seifert holds a B.A. and an M.B.A. from Friedrich-Alexander University and an M.A. in Economics from Wayne State University.

executives.name: Victor Peng
executives.background: Victor Peng is the former President of AMD and former CEO of Xilinx, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: President, Adaptive and Embedded Computing Group
